name: Kasha Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Process the raisins and water in a food processor until combined.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to your bread machine or mixing bowl in the following order: egg beaters, apple juice concentrate, salt, gluten, whole-grain buckwheat flour, whole-wheat flour, and yeast.
3. Mix all ingredients together until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan and place it in the center of the oven.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for approximately 45-50 minutes or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
